package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerStringHandlingStringLowerForCaseInsensitiveCompare() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_string_handling_string_lower_for_case_insensitive_compare"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: String handling. Flag strings.ToLower comparisons where EqualFold avoids extra allocation."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
